audit_opinion: The document set now supports the completed bounded V12-V15 review chain: V12 product entity/workbench/read-only canvas foundation, V13 editable Studio pilot, V14 governed extension ecosystem pilot and V15 frontend interaction baseline. It does not support production GA, Xpert parity, product-grade frontend completion, complete Workflow Studio readiness or Agent executor readiness. Any next implementation stage needs a new scope, PRD/architecture review, acceptance plan and audit closure.
